name: Chicken with Cucumber and Saffron
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast in half. Discard peripheral fat and membranes.
2. Core the tomatoes and cut them into 1/2-inch cubes. There should be about 2-1/2 cups loosely packed.
3. Peel the cucumbers and trim off the ends. Cut the cucumbers into 1-1/2-inch lengths and quarter the pieces lengthwise. Discard the seeds. There should be about 3 cups loosely packed. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Heat the oil in a large, heavy skillet and add the chicken breasts in one layer. Cook over moderately high heat, shaking the pan and lifting the pieces, about 2 minutes or until golden brown. Turn the pieces and cook for another 3 minutes on the other side. Transfer to a warmed dish and keep hot.
5. Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook, stirring, for 1 minute. Add the tomatoes and stir. Cook for 1 minute, then add the wine and broth. Stir to blend and cook for another 1 minute more.
6. Add the cucumber pieces and any liquid that has accumulated around the chicken pieces on the plate. Add salt and pepper to taste. Cook over high heat about 6 minutes.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet and turn to coat with the sauce. Add the saffron. Cover the skillet and cook for 4 minutes. Then serve.
